StmtSimple.StatementText: SELECT MIN(an.name) AS acress_pseudonym, MIN(t.title) AS japanese_anime_movie FROM job.aka_name AS an, job.cast_info AS ci, job.company_name AS cn, job.movie_companies AS mc, job.name AS n, job.role_type AS rt, job.title AS t WHERE ci.note ='(voice: English version)' AND cn.country_code ='[jp]' AND mc.note LIKE '%(Japan)%' AND mc.note NOT LIKE '%(USA)%' AND (mc.note LIKE '%(2006)%' OR mc.note LIKE '%(2007)%') AND n.name LIKE '%Yo%' AND n.name NOT LIKE '%Yu%' AND rt.role ='actress' AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2006 AND 2007 AND (t.title LIKE 'One Piece%' OR t.title LIKE 'Dragon Ball Z%') AND an.person_id = n.id AND n.id = ci.person_id AND ci.movie_id = t.id AND t.id = mc.movie_id AND mc.company_id = cn.id AND ci.role_id = rt.id AND an.person_id = ci.person_id AND ci.movie_id = mc.movie_id

ScalarOperator.ScalarString: [dbprove].[job].[title].[title] as [t].[title] like 'One Piece%' OR [dbprove].[job].[title].[title] as [t].[title] like 'Dragon Ball Z%'

[dbprove].[job].[movie_companies].[note] as [mc].[note] like '%(Japan)%' AND NOT [dbprove].[job].[movie_companies].[note] as [mc].[note] like '%(USA)%' AND ([dbprove].[job].[movie_companies].[note] as [mc].[note] like '%(2006)%' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_companies].[note] as [mc].[note] like '%(2007)%')
[dbprove].[job].[name].[name] as [n].[name] like '%Yo%' AND NOT [dbprove].[job].[name].[name] as [n].[name] like '%Yu%'
